name: Leprohon
message: Leprohon Inc is a company that operates in the Commercial & Residential Construction industry. It employs 250to499 people and has 25Mto50M of revenue. The company is headquartered in Sherbrooke, Quebec, Canada.company is headquartered in 6171 Boulevard Bourque, Sherbrooke, Québec, J1N 1H2, Canada.351 Employees
